ddls:
CREATE TABLE "butterflies" (
  "butterfly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each butterfly */,
  "image_label" TEXT /* Label of the image used for analysis */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("butterfly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_butterflies_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_butterflies_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_butterflies_image_label FOREIGN KEY ("image_label") REFERENCES images ("image_label")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the butterfly */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the butterfly */,
  "subsp" TEXT /* Subspecies of the butterfly */,
  "sp_subsp" TEXT /* Full taxonomy of the butterfly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_label" TEXT /* Label of the image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images_3d" (
  "image_3d_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each 3D model */,
  "butterfly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the butterfly */,
  "image_3d_path" TEXT /* Path to the 3D model file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_3d_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_3d_butterfly_id FOREIGN KEY ("butterfly_id") REFERENCES butterflies ("butterfly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "butterfly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the butterfly */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the butterfly wing */,
  "elip_major_axis" REAL /* Length of the major axis of the wing */,
  "elip_minor_axis" REAL /* Length of the minor axis of the wing */,
  "angle" REAL /* Angle of the wing */,
  "circ" REAL /* Circumference of the wing */,
  "feret" REAL /* Feret diameter of the wing */,
  "feretx" REAL /* X-coordinate of the Feret diameter */,
  "ferety" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the Feret diameter */,
  "feret_angle" REAL /* Angle of the Feret diameter */,
  "min_feret" REAL /* Minimum Feret diameter */,
  "aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the wing */,
  "roundness" REAL /* Roundness of the wing */,
  "solidity" REAL /* Solidity of the wing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_butterfly_id FOREIGN KEY ("butterfly_id") REFERENCES butterflies ("butterfly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the butterflies were collected */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the butterflies were collected */,
  "locality" TEXT /* Locality where the butterflies were collected */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the collection site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the collection site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the collection site */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date of collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "butterfly_collections" (
  "butterfly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the butterfly */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("butterfly_id", "collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "butterfly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the butterfly */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_butterfly_id FOREIGN KEY ("butterfly_id") REFERENCES butterflies ("butterfly_id")
)
column_names: Label of the image used for analysis
Length of the major axis of the wing
Length of the minor axis of the wing
Country where the butterflies were collected
Province where the butterflies were collected
Locality where the butterflies were collected
